zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Norreys於大約1483年出生在英國時，她的父親Sir William Norreys43歲，母親Anne Horne11481歲。她於大約1509年與John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire在英國波克夏亞頓登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1529年在她的家鄉享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Norreys于大约1483年出生在英国时，她的父亲Sir William Norreys43岁，母亲Anne Horne11481岁。她于大约1509年与John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire在英国波克夏亞頓登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1529年在她的家乡享年47岁。

variants.name: Norris
meanings: habitational name from Middle English norreis, noreis, norais ‘northerner’ (Anglo-Norman French noreis), used both of Norwegians and of inhabitants of northern England and Scotland.
from the Middle English personal name Norreis, derived from norreis ‘northerner’.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Norreys was born about 1483, in England, her father, Sir William Norreys, was 43 and her mother, Anne Horne, was 11481. She married John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire about 1509, in Yattendon, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1529, in her hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Norreys est née environ 1483, à Angleterre, son père, Sir William Norreys, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Anne Horne, avait 11481 ans. Elle a épousé John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire environ 1509, à Yattendon, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1529, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane Norreys um 1483 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Norreys 43 und ihre Mutter Anne Horne 11481. Sie hat um 1509 in Yattendon, Berkshire, England John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1529 im Alter von 47 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Norreys è nata il circa 1483 nel England, sua padre, Sir William Norreys, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Anne Horne, aveva 11481 anni. Lei sposato John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire circa 1509, nel Yattendon, Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1529, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Norreysが約1483年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir William Norreysは43歳，母Anne Horneは11481歳であった。約1509年にイギリスバークシュアイアヤッテンドンでJohn Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1529年に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Norreys(이)가 대략 1483년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Norreys(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Horne(은)는 11481세였다. 그녀는 대략 1509년 영국 버크실르 야텐던에서 John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1529년 그녀의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Norreys nasceu aproximadamente 1483, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Norreys, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Anne Horne, tinha 11481 anos. Ela casou-se com John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire aproximadamente 1509, em Yattendon, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1529, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Norreys родилась около 1483 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Norreys было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Horne, 11481. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire около 1509 г. в местности яттендон, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1529 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jane Norreys nació aproximadamente 1483, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Norreys, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Anne Horne, tenía 11481 años. Se casó con John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire aproximadamente 1509, en Yattendon, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1529, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años.
